message:
fix(ci): Pin Windows Python to 3.13.11 for version alignment

The Linux/macOS CPython test jobs build from commit 627894459a84be3488a1789919679c997056a03c
which corresponds to Python 3.13.11. Windows uses pre-built binaries via actions/setup-python,
so we need to pin to the exact version "3.13.11" (not just "3.13") to ensure consistent
behavior across all platforms.

files.patch:
@@ -826,10 +826,10 @@ jobs:
         with:
           submodules: true
 
-      - name: Setup Python 3.13 (Windows uses pre-built binary)
+      - name: Setup Python 3.13.11 (Windows uses pre-built binary)
         uses: actions/setup-python@v5
         with:
-          python-version: "3.13"
+          python-version: "3.13.11"
 
       - name: Run CPython Windows-specific tests
         shell: pwsh
